board-members-same-org-team-only: Yongeza amalungu ebhodi kuphela avela kuMbutho okanye iQela elinye
restrict-comment-editing: Thintela abalawuli bebhodi ekuhleleni okanye ekucimeni izimvo zabanye abasebenzisi
error-user-notSameOrgOrTeam: Ungongeza kuphela abasebenzisi abavela kuMbutho okanye iQela elinye
act-addAttachment: wongeze uncamathiselo __attachment__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-deleteAttachment: uncamathiselo olucinyiweyo __attachment__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwi-swimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-addSubtask: wongeze umsebenzi ongaphantsi __subtask__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-addLabel: Ileyibhile yongezwe __label__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-addedLabel: Ileyibhile yongezwe __label__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-removeLabel: Isusiwe ileyibhile __label__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-removedLabel: Isusiwe ileyibhile __label__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-addChecklist: yongezwe uluhlu lokutshekisha __checklist__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-addChecklistItem: yongeza into yoluhlu lokutshekisha __checklistItem__ kuluhlu lokutshekisha __checklist__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-removeChecklist: lususiwe uluhlu lokutshekisha __checklist__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-removeChecklistItem: isusiwe into yoluhlu lokutshekisha __checklistItem__ kuluhlu lokutshekisha __checkList__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-checkedItem: ihlolwe __checklistItem__ yoluhlu lokukhangela __checklist__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-uncheckedItem: ayikhange ikhangelwe __checklistItem__ yoluhlu lokukhangela __checklist__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-completeChecklist: Uluhlu lokutshekisha olugqityiweyo __checklist__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwi-swimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-uncompleteChecklist: uluhlu lokukhangela olungagqitywanga __checklist__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-editComment: uluvo oluhleliweyo kwikhadi __card__: __comment__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-deleteComment: icinyiwe uluvo kwikhadi __card__: __comment__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-setCustomField: intsimi yesiko ehleliweyo __customField__: __customFieldValue__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-archivedCard: Ikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwi-swimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__ isiwe kwindawo yokugcina izinto
act-archivedList: Uluhlu __list__ eswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__ isiwe kwindawo yokugcina izinto
act-importCard: ikhadi elithathwe ngaphandle __card__ ukudwelisa __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-joinMember: ilungu longezwe __member__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-moveCard: ikhadi lisusiwe __card__ ebhodini __board__ kuluhlu __oldList__ kwiswimlane __oldSwimlane__ ukudwelisa __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__
act-moveCardToOtherBoard: ikhadi elisusiweyo __card__ kuluhlu __oldList__ kwindawo yokuqubha __oldSwimlane__ ebhodini __oldBoard__ ukudwelisa __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
act-unjoinMember: lisusiwe ilungu __member__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwiswimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
activity-checklist-item-added: wongeze into yoluhlu lokutshekisha ku-'%s' kwi-%s
activity-checklist-item-removed: Ususe into yoluhlu lokukhangela ku-'%s' kwi-%s
activity-checklist-completed-card: Uluhlu lokutshekisha olugqityiweyo __checklist__ kwikhadi __card__ kuluhlu __list__ kwi-swimlane __swimlane__ ebhodini __board__
allboards.delete-workspace-confirm: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima le ndawo yokusebenza?
list-width-error-message: Ububanzi boluhlu kufuneka bube linani elipheleleyo elingaphezu kwama-270
list-width-shared-note: Obu bubanzi babelwana nawo wonke umntu kule bhodi.
personal-list-width-description: Xa kuvuliwe, umsebenzisi ngamnye ugcina ububanzi bakhe boluhlu. Xa kuvaliwe, ububanzi boluhlu babelwana nawo wonke umntu ebhodini.
click-to-enable-fixed-list-width: Ububanzi obufanayo kuzo zonke izintlu buvaliwe. Cofa ukuze uvule.
click-to-disable-fixed-list-width: Ububanzi obufanayo kuzo zonke izintlu buvuliwe. Cofa ukuze uvale.
fixed-list-width-note: Xa kuvuliwe, zonke izintlu zinobubanzi obufanayo, kwaye ukutshintsha ubungakanani boluhlu olunye kutshintsha zonke izintlu. Esi sicwangciso sesakho kuphela.
keyboard-shortcuts-enabled: Iindlela ezimfutshane ze-keyboard zivuliwe. Cofa ukuvala.
keyboard-shortcuts-disabled: Iindlela ezimfutshane ze-keyboard zivaliwe. Cofa ukuze uvule.
swimlane-height-error-message: Ubude bomgama wokuqubha kufuneka bube yinani elipheleleyo
close-add-checklist-item: Vala yongeza into kwifom yoluhlu lokukhangela
close-edit-checklist-item: Vala ukuhlela into kwifomu yoluhlu lokukhangela
admin-desc: Ungajonga kwaye uhlele amakhadi, ukususa amalungu, kwaye utshintshe izicwangciso zebhodi. Iyakwazi ukujonga imisebenzi.
app-is-offline: Iyalayisha, nceda ulinde. Ukuhlaziya iphepha kuya kubangela ukulahleka kwedatha. Ukuba ukulayisha akusebenzi, nceda ujonge ukuba umncedisi akayekanga.
card_members: Onke amalungu ekhadi langoku kule bhodi
board_assignees: Bonke ababelwe kuwo onke amakhadi kule bhodi
card_assignees: Bonke ababelwe ikhadi langoku kule bhodi
board-drag-drop-reorder-or-click-open: Tsala kwaye ulahle ukucwangcisa kwakhona ii-icon zebhodi. Cofa uphawu lwebhodi ukuze uvule ibhodi.
board-open-and-move-between-remaining-an: Cofa ukuze uvule ibhodi. Sebenzisa isiphatho sotsalo ukwabela ibhodi ku-__workspaces__ (yilahla kwindawo yokusebenza kwibar esecaleni).
mobile-desktop-toggle: Guqula phakathi kweMowudi yeMobile kunye neDesktop
board-archived: Le bhodi ifuduselwe kwindawo yokugcina izinto ezibalulekileyo.
card-delete-notice: Ukucima kusisigxina. Uya kuphulukana nazo zonke iintshukumo ezinxulumene neli khadi.
card-delete-pop: Zonke izenzo ziya kususwa kwisondlo kwaye awuzukwazi ukuphinda uvule ikhadi. Akukho kuguqulwa.
card-delete-suggest-archive: Ungahambisa ikhadi kuVimba ukuze ulisuse ebhodini kwaye ugcine umsebenzi.
card-archive-pop: Ikhadi aliyi kubonakala kolu luhlu emva kokugcinwa kwekhadi.
list-archive-pop: Uluhlu aluyi kubonakala ebhodini emva kogcino.
list-archive-suggest: Unokuthi kamva ubuyisele uluhlu oluvela kuVimba kwiiSetingi zeBhodi.
swimlane-archive-pop: I-Swimlane ayiyi kubonakala ebhodini emva kokugcinwa kwe-archive.
swimlane-archive-suggest: Unokuthi kamva ubuyisele i-swimlane kwi-Archive kwiiSetingi zeBhodi.
card-members-title: Yongeza okanye ususe amalungu ebhodi ekhadini.
vote-delete-pop: Ukucima kusisigxina. Uya kuphulukana nazo zonke izenzo ezinxulumene nale voti.
editPokerEndDatePopup-title: Tshintsha usuku lokuphela kwevoti yoCwangciso lwePoker
poker-delete-pop: Ukucima kusisigxina. Uya kuphulukana nazo zonke izenzo ezinxulumene nale poker yokucwangcisa.
font-preview-text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog 0123456789
click-to-enable-auto-width: Ububanzi boluhlu oluzenzekelayo luvaliwe. Cofa ukuze uvule.
click-to-disable-auto-width: Ububanzi boluhlu oluzenzekelayo luvuliwe. Cofa ukuvala.
card-aging: Ukwaluphala kwekhadi (cima ngokuthe fatyi amakhadi amadala)
card-aging-tier1: Inqanaba 1 (ukucima okukhaphukhaphu) emva kwezi ntsuku zingaka zingasebenziyo
card-aging-tier2: Inqanaba 2 (ukucima okuphakathi) emva kwezi ntsuku zingaka zingasebenziyo
card-aging-tier3: Inqanaba 3 (ukucima okunzima) emva kwezi ntsuku zingaka zingasebenziyo
close-board-pop: Uya kukwazi ukubuyisela ibhodi ngokucofa iqhosha elithi "Archive" elivela kwisihloko sasekhaya.
comment-assigned-only-desc: Amakhadi anikezelweyo kuphela abonakalayo. Unokuphawula kuphela.
read-assigned-only-desc: Amakhadi anikezelweyo kuphela abonakalayo. Ayikwazi ukuhlela.
worker-desc: Inokuhambisa amakhadi kuphela, izinikele kwikhadi kunye nezimvo.
confirm-checklist-delete-popup: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima uluhlu lokukhangela?
confirm-checklist-item-delete-popup: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima into yoluhlu lokukhangela?
confirm-move-list-to-swimlane: Hambisa olu luhlu nawo onke amakhadi alo kwenye i-swimlane?
copyManyCardsPopup-instructions: Izihloko zeKhadi leNdalo kunye neeNkcazelo kule fomathi ye-JSON
copyManyCardsPopup-format: [ {"isihloko": "Isihloko sekhadi lokuqala", "inkcazo":"inkcazo yekhadi lokuqala"}, {"isihloko":"Isihloko sekhadi lesibini","inkcazo":"inkcazo yekhadi lesibini"},{"isihloko":"Isihloko sekhadi lokugqibela","inkcazo":"inkcazo yekhadi lokugqibela"} ]
custom-field-delete-pop: Akukho kuguqulwa. Oku kuya kususa le ndawo yesiko kuwo onke amakhadi kwaye itshabalalise imbali yayo.
email-enrollAccount-text:
Molo __user__,

Ukuqala ukusebenzisa le nkonzo, nqakraza ikhonkco elingezantsi.

__url__

Enkosi.
email-invite-text:
sithandwa __user__,

__inviter__ ukumema ukuba ujoyine ibhodi "__board__" ngentsebenziswano.

Nceda ulandele ikhonkco elingezantsi:

__url__

Enkosi.
email-resetPassword-subject: Phinda umisele igama lokugqithisa lakho ku-__siteName__
email-resetPassword-text:
Molo __user__,

Ukuseta kwakhona igama eligqithisiweyo, nqakraza nje ikhonkco elingezantsi.

__url__

Enkosi.
email-verifyEmail-text:
Molo __user__,

Ukuqinisekisa iakhawunti yakho ye-imeyile, nqakraza ngokulula ikhonkco elingezantsi.

__url__

Enkosi.
error-board-notAdmin: Kufuneka ube admin wale bhodi ukwenza lonto
error-board-notAMember: Kufuneka ube lilungu lale bhodi ukwenza oko
error-notAllowed: Indima yakho yebhodi ayivumelekanga ukwenza oko
error-json-schema: Idatha yakho ye-JSON ayibandakanyi ulwazi olufanelekileyo kwifomethi echanekileyo
error-csv-schema: I-CSV yakho(Amaxabiso Okwahlulwe ngokweComma)/TSV (Amaxabiso Okwahlulwe kweTab) ayiquki ulwazi olululo ngendlela eyiyo.
error-import-empty-board: Oku kukhutshwa akuqulathi nzo yebhodi (akukho swimlanes, izintlu okanye amakhadi). Kusenokwenzeka ukuba kwenziwe yinguqulelo endala ye-WeKan enesiphene esaziwayo sokukhupha. Nceda uphinde ukhuphe ibhodi ngenguqulelo yangoku uze ungenise ifayile entsha.
error-linked-card-not-allowed: Ungadibanisa kuphela nekhadi eliqhelekileyo. Ukudibanisa nelinye ikhadi elidityanisiweyo, okanye nekhadi elibuyela kule bhodi, akuvumelekanga kuba oku kungenza amakhadi angafikeleleki.
export-card-excel-fields: Khetha iindawo oza kuzifaka kwiExcel yokuthunyelwa ngaphandle:
export-card-excel-no-disk-space: Ayinakuthumela ngaphandle kwi-Excel: akukho ndawo yaneleyo yedisk
filter-on-desc: Uhluza amakhadi kule bhodi. Cofa apha ukuhlela isihluzo.
advanced-filter-description: Isihluzi esikwinqanaba eliphambili livumela ukubhala umtya oqulathe abaqhubi abalandelayo: == != <= >= && || () Isithuba sisetyenziswa njengomahluli phakathi kwabaSebenzisi. Unokuzihluza zonke iiNdawo eziSiko ngokuchwetheza amagama kunye namaxabiso azo. Umzekelo: Ummandla1 == Ixabiso1. Qaphela: Ukuba amasimi okanye amaxabiso aqulathe izithuba, kufuneka uwahlanganisele kucatshulo olunye. Umzekelo: 'Ummandla 1' == 'Ixabiso loku-1'. Ukufumana abasebenzi bolawulo olunye (' \/) ukuba batsibe, ungasebenzisa \. Umzekelo: Indawo1 == Ndim. Kwakhona unokudibanisa iimeko ezininzi. Umzekelo: F1 == V1 || F1 == V2. Ngokwesiqhelo bonke abasebenzi batolikwa ukusuka ekhohlo ukuya ekunene. Unokutshintsha iodolo ngokubeka izibiyeli. Umzekelo: F1 == V1 && ( F2 == V2 || F2 == V3). Kananjalo unokukhangela iindawo ezibhaliweyo usebenzisa i-regex: F1 == /Tes.*/i
imported-member-no-account: Ilungu elingenisiweyo — akukho akhawunti ihambelanayo okwangoku
import-board-instruction-kanboard: Ncamathelisa i-JSON ekhutshelwe ngaphandle ye-Kanboard: into ene-"columns" (okanye ii-tasks eziphethe i-column_name) kunye ne-array ye-"tasks" (title, description, column_name, swimlane_name, date_due, owner, tags). Ii-columns ziba zizintlu kwaye ii-tasks ziba ngamakhadi.
import-board-instruction-deck: Ncamathelisa i-JSON yebhodi ye-NextCloud Deck (ibhodi ene-"stacks", i-stack nganye iphethe "cards" zayo). Ii-stacks ziba zizintlu kwaye ii-cards ziba ngamakhadi.
import-board-instruction-openproject: Ncamathelisa i-JSON yeqoqo le-work-packages ye-OpenProject (GET /api/v3/work_packages). Ii-statuses ziba zizintlu kwaye ii-work packages ziba ngamakhadi.
import-board-instruction-issues: Ncamathelisa i-array ye-JSON ye-issues ye-__sourceName__ (__endpoint__). Ii-issues ziba ngamakhadi ahlelwe kwizintlu ezithi Open / Closed.
import-board-instruction-asana: Ncamathelisa i-JSON yokukhutshwa kwe-tasks ye-Asana ({ "data": [...] } evela kukukhutshwa kwe-Asana okanye GET /tasks). Ii-tasks zihlelwa ngokwamacandelo (memberships); ii-tasks ezigqityiweyo ziya ku-Done.
import-board-instruction-zenkit: Ncamathelisa i-JSON yokukhutshwa koluhlu lwe-ZenKit ({ "title", "stages":[...], "items":[...] }). Ii-stages ziba zizintlu kwaye ii-items ziba ngamakhadi.
import-board-instruction-trello: Kwibhodi yakho ye-Trello, yiya ku-'Menu', emva koko 'Ngakumbi', 'Shicilela kwaye uThunyele ngaphandle', 'Thumela ngaphandle i-JSON', kwaye ukhuphele isicatshulwa esinesiphumo.
import-board-instruction-csv: Ncamathelisa iComma Separated Values(CSV)/Tab yakho eyahluliweyo amaxabiso (TSV) .
import-board-instruction-jira: Ncamathelisa i-JSON evela kuphendlo lwe-issue lwe-Jira Cloud REST API (GET /rest/api/2/search), okanye into elingana nayo { "issues": [...] }. Ii-statuses ze-Jira ziba zizintlu kwaye ii-issues ziba ngamakhadi. Ngokukhethayo faka i-array ye-"automationRules" ukungenisa imithetho.
import-board-instruction-excel: Khetha i-spreadsheet ye-.xlsx yohlobo lwe-WeKan (iikholam ezifanayo nezokukhutshwa kwe-Excel: Title, Description, Status/List, Members, Labels, imihla, iindawo zesiko). Umqolo wokuqala ngumbhalo-ntloko.
import-board-instruction-wekan: Kwibhodi yakho, yiya 'kwiMenu', emva koko 'Ibhodi ethumela ngaphandle', kwaye ukhuphele okubhaliweyo kwifayile ekhutshelweyo.
import-board-instruction-about-errors: Ukuba ufumana iimpazamo xa ungenisa ibhodi, ngamanye amaxesha ukungenisa elizweni kusasebenza, kwaye ibhodi ikwiphepha leeBhodi zonke.
import-json-placeholder: Ncamathelisa idatha yakho esebenzayo ye-JSON apha
import-csv-placeholder: Ncamathelisa idatha yakho esebenzayo ye-CSV/TSV apha
import-attachments-zip: I-ZIP yeziqhoboshelo ze-Trello (ngokukhethayo, evela kwi-Trello Card Attachments Downloader)
import-trello-json-file-hint: Ibhodi enye ye-Trello ekhutshelwe njenge-.json. Ukuba ugcine i-Trello API key kunye ne-token, iziqhoboshelo zayo, imvelaphi yebhodi kunye nee-avatars zamalungu nazo ziyakhutshelwa.
import-trello-zip-file-hint: I-.zip enefayile enye okanye ngaphezulu zebhodi ze-.json kunye neziqhoboshelo zazo kwii-subfolders zamagama ebhodi (evela kwi-Trello Card Attachments Downloader). Zonke iibhodi ziyangeniswa.
import-trello-zip-no-boards: Akukho zifayile zebhodi ze-Trello ze-.json ezifunyenwe kwi-.zip.
import-trello-zip-progress: Kungeniswa iibhodi ezivela kwi-.zip, nceda ulinde…
import-trello-zip-too-many-files: I-.zip inezifayile ezininzi kakhulu ukuba zingangeniswa.
import-trello-zip-file-too-large: Ifayile engaphakathi kwi-.zip inkulu kakhulu ukuba ingangeniswa.
import-trello-zip-unsafe-path: I-.zip iqulethe iindlela zefayile ezingakhuselekanga kwaye yaliwe.
import-trello-workspace-placeholder: Ibhodi engenisiweyo ibekwa phantsi kwale ndawo yokusebenza, yenziwe ukuba ayikho
import-trello-parent-workspace: Beka iindawo zokusebenza ezingenisiweyo phantsi kwe-
trello-api-import: Ngenisa ngokuthe ngqo ukusuka kwi-Trello nge-API key kunye ne-token
trello-api-import-desc: Ncamathelisa i-Trello API key yakho kunye ne-token ukudwelisa iindawo zakho zokusebenza ze-Trello kunye neebhodi, emva koko ungenise ezikhethiweyo kunye neziqhoboshelo zazo.
trello-api-token: I-Trello API token (eyenziwe ngesandla ngezantsi kwe-API key)
trello-api-credentials-required: Nceda ufake zombini i-Trello API key kunye ne-token.
trello-api-credentials-saved: I-Trello API key kunye ne-token zigciniwe. Ungadwelisa iindawo zokusebenza ngaphandle kokuziphinda ufake.
trello-select-boards: Nceda ukhethe ubuncinane ibhodi enye ukuze uyingenise.
trello-cancel-delete-confirm: Rhoxisa ukungenisa kwaye ucime iibhodi sele zingenisiwe leli msebenzi? Oku akunakuguqulwa.
import-members-map: Ibhodi yakho evela kumazwe angaphandle inamalungu athile. Nceda imephu amalungu ofuna ukungenisa kubasebenzisi bakho
import-members-map-note: Qaphela: Amalungu angafakwanga kwimaphu aya kwabelwa kumsebenzisi wangoku.
import-user-select: Khetha umsebenzisi wakho okhoyo ofuna ukumsebenzisa njengelungu
label-delete-pop: Akukho kuguqulwa. Oku kuya kususa le lebhile kuwo onke amakhadi kwaye itshabalalise imbali yayo.
last-admin-desc: Awunakutshintsha iindima kuba kufuneka kubekho umlawuli omnye.
leave-board-pop: Uqinisekile ufuna ukuhamba __boardTitle__? Uya kususwa kuwo onke amakhadi kule bhodi.
list-archive-cards: Hambisa onke amakhadi kolu luhlu uwafake kuVimba
list-archive-cards-pop: Oku kuya kususa onke amakhadi kolu luhlu ebhodini. Ukujonga amakhadi kwi-Archive kwaye uwabuyisele ebhodini, cofa "Imenyu"> "Gcina".
list-delete-pop: Zonke izenzo ziya kususwa kwisondlo kwaye awuyi kukwazi ukubuyisela uluhlu. Akukho kuguqulwa.
list-delete-suggest-archive: Ungahambisa uluhlu kuVimba ukuze ulususe ebhodini kwaye ugcine umsebenzi.
muted-info: Awusoze waziswe ngalo naluphi na utshintsho kule bhodi
name: Igama
no-archived-swimlanes: Akukho ndawo zokuqubha kwindawo yokugcina izinto ezibalulekileyo.
normal-desc: Ungajonga kwaye uhlele amakhadi. Akunakukwazi ukutshintsha iisetingi.
normal-assigned-only-desc: Amakhadi anikezelweyo kuphela abonakalayo. Hlela njengomsebenzisi oqhelekileyo.
notify-participate: Fumana uhlaziyo kuwo nawaphi na amakhadi othatha inxaxheba njengomdali okanye ilungu
notify-watch: Fumana uhlaziyo kuzo naziphi na iibhodi, izintlu, okanye amakhadi owabukeleyo
page-maybe-private: Eli phepha linokuba labucala. Ungakwazi ukuyibona ngo- logging in.
paste-or-dragdrop: ukuncamathelisa, okanye tsala & uwise ifayile yomfanekiso kuyo (umfanekiso kuphela)
private-desc: Le bhodi ibucala. Ngabantu abongezwe kwibhodi kuphela abanokuyijonga kwaye bayihlele.
public-desc: Le bhodi isesidlangalaleni. Ibonakala kuye nabani na onekhonkco kwaye iya kuvela kwiinjini zokukhangela ezifana noGoogle. Ngabantu abongezwe kwibhodi kuphela abanokuhlela.
quick-access-description: Faka inkwenkwezi ebhodini ukongeza indlela emfutshane kule bar.
remove-member-pop: Susa __name__ (__username__) ukusuka __boardTitle__? Ilungu liya kususwa kuwo onke amakhadi kule bhodi. Baya kufumana isaziso.
rescue-card-description: Bonisa incoko yokuhlangula phambi kokuba uvale iinkcazelo zekhadi ezingagcinwanga
rescue-card-description-dialogue: Bhala phezu kwenkcazelo yekhadi yangoku kunye notshintsho lwakho?
search-cards: Khangela kwikhadi / uluhlu lwezihloko, iinkcazo kunye nemimandla yesiko kule bhodi
search-example: Bhala umbhalo owukhangelayo kwaye ucinezele u-Enter
set-wip-limit-value: Misela umda welona nani liphezulu lemisebenzi kolu luhlu
show-cards-minimum-count: Bonisa ubalo lwamakhadi ukuba uluhlu luqulethe ngaphezulu
star-board-title: Cofa ukwenza inkwenkwezi kule bhodi. Iya kubonakala phezulu kuluhlu lwakho lweebhodi.
set-default-board-title: Cofa ukuze uvule le bhodi ngokuzenzekelayo emva kokuba ungenile.
unset-default-board-title: Le bhodi ivuleka emva kokuba ungenile. Cofa ukuze uyeke ukuyivula ngokuzenzekelayo.
starred-boards-description: Iibhodi ezineenkwenkwezi zivela phezulu kuluhlu lweebhodi zakho.
title: Isihloko
toggle-labels: Guqula iilebhile 1-9 zekhadi. Ukhetho oluninzi longeza iilebhile 1-9
tracking-info: Uya kwaziswa ngalo naluphi na utshintsho kuloo makhadi ubandakanyekayo njengomdali okanye ilungu.
custom-top-left-corner-logo-image-url: I-URL yomfanekiso we-URL yomfanekiso weKona ePhezulu yaKhohlo eKhohlo
custom-top-left-corner-logo-link-url: Unxulumano lweURL yeKhona ePhezulu yaKhohlo eKhohlo eKhohlo
custom-top-left-corner-logo-height: Custom Top Ikona yasekhohlo Logo Height. Ukuhlala kukho: 27
automatic-linked-url-schemes: Izicwangciso ze-URL yesiko ekufuneka zicofeke ngokuzenzekelayo. Isicwangciso se-URL enye ngomgca ngamnye
watching-info: Uya kwaziswa ngalo naluphi na utshintsho kule bhodi
wipLimitErrorPopup-dialog-pt1: Inani lemisebenzi kolu luhlu liphezulu kunomda we-WIP owuchazileyo.
wipLimitErrorPopup-dialog-pt2: Nceda ususe eminye imisebenzi ngaphandle kolu luhlu, okanye usete umda ophezulu weWIP.
attachment-transfer-limits-title: Imida yoBungakanani beFayile yeSiqhoboshelo kunye ne-API
attachment-transfer-limits-description: Cwangcisa imida yobungakanani obukhulu befayile yokulayisha kunye nokukhuphela. Ukudlulisa kwe-API kune-buffering enemida yokhuseleko eyahlukileyo kwicala leseva.
attachment-transfer-limits-invalid-value: Nceda ufake ixabiso lomda elivumelekileyo elingaphezu kwe-zero
avatars-upload-blocked-description: Thintela abasebenzisi ekulayisheni ii-avatars ezintsha (iluncedo xa ii-avatars zivunyelaniswa nomnye umthombo). Ii-avatars zivuliwe ngokumiselweyo.
smtp-host-description: Idilesi yomncedisi we SMTP ephethe ii-imeyile zakho.
smtp-port-description: Izibuko usebenzisa umncedisi wakho we SMTP kwiiimeyile eziphumayo.
email-invite-register-text:
sithandwa __user__,

__inviter__ ukumema kwibhodi kanban kwintsebenziswano.

Nceda ulandele ikhonkco elingezantsi:
__url__

Kwaye ikhowudi yakho yesimemo ithi: __icode__

Enkosi.
tableVisibilityMode-allowPrivateOnly: Ukubonakala kweebhodi: Vumela iibhodi zabucala kuphela
board-delete-notice: Ukucima kusisigxina. Uya kuphulukana nalo lonke uluhlu, amakhadi kunye nezenzo ezinxulumene nale bhodi.
delete-board-confirm-popup: Lonke uluhlu, amakhadi, iilebhile, kunye nemisebenzi iya kucinywa kwaye awuyi kukwazi ukubuyisela imixholo yebhodi. Akukho kuguqulwa.
delete-all-notifications-confirm: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima zonke izaziso? Esi senzo asinakuphinda singenziwa.
delete-duplicate-lists-confirm: Ingaba uqinisekile? Oku kuyakucima zonke izintlu eziphindwe kabini ezinegama elifanayo kwaye azinamakhadi.
deposit-subtasks-list: Uluhlu lokufikela lwemisebenzi engaphantsi efakwe apha:
checklist-count-on-minicard: Inani lezinto zoluhlu lokukhangela (0/0) kwikhadi elincinci
r-workflow-help: Tsala i-trigger kunye nesenzo ukungenisa kwisakhi, emva koko wongeze umthetho. Tsala isenzo phezu komthetho okhoyo ukutshintsha oko akwenzayo.
r-w-set-received-now: Misela umhla wokufunyanwa ukuba ube ngoku
r-import-trello: Ngenisa imithetho evela kwi-Trello Butler (umzamo ongcono)
r-import-paste: Ncamathelisa imithetho ekhutshelweyo (JSON okanye CSV) okanye imiyalelo ye-Trello Butler apha
r-import-trello-note: Ukukhutshwa kweebhodi ze-Trello akuqulathi imithetho ye-Butler. Ncamathelisa umbhalo womyalelo we-Butler apha ukudibanisa isethi engaphantsi exhaswayo; imigca engadibananga iyaxelwa.
r-import-workflow-note: Ngenisa i-workflow ebonakalayo ekhutshelwe kwi-n8n okanye i-Node-RED. Ii-nodes ze-trigger/action eziqondwayo zidityaniswa nemithetho ye-WeKan; ii-nodes ezingadibananga ziyaxelwa.
r-board-note: Qaphela: shiya umhlaba ungenanto ukuze uthelekise lonke ixabiso elinokwenzeka.
r-checklist-note: Qaphela: izinto zoluhlu lokutshekisha kufuneka zibhalwe njengamaxabiso ahlulwe ngokwekoma.
hide-card-counter-list: Fihla uluhlu lwezinto zokubala zamakhadi kuzo zonke iibhodi
hide-board-member-list: Fihla uluhlu lwamalungu ebhodi kuzo zonke iiBhodi
add-custom-html-before-body-end: Yongeza iHTML eSiko ngaphambi kwe-</body> ekupheleni
swimlane-delete-pop: Zonke izenzo ziya kususwa kwisondlo umsebenzi kwaye akuyi kuba nako ukubuyisela swimlane. Akukho kuguqulwa.
act-a-dueAt:
ilungiswe ngexesha elifanelekileyo 
Xa: __timeValue__
Apho: @ PH1 @ @
 edlulileyo ibifuneka __timeOldValue__
act-pastdue: ibikhumbuza ixesha langoku elifunekayo (__timeValue__) le-__card__ lidlule
delete-user-confirm-popup: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima le akhawunti? Akukho kuguqulwa.
delete-team-confirm-popup: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima eli qela? Akukho kuguqulwa.
delete-org-confirm-popup: Uqinisekile ufuna ukuwucima lo mbutho? Akukho kuguqulwa.
accounts-allowUserDelete: Vumela abasebenzisi ukuba bazicime iakhawunti yabo
submit-on-enter-description: Xa ivuliwe, ukucofa u-Enter kugcina isihloko sekhadi, inkcazo kunye nabanye abahleli abangaphakathi; Shift+Enter ifaka umgca omtsha. Xa icimile, Ctrl/Cmd+Enter iyagcina kwaye u-Enter ufaka umgca omtsha.
roles-info: Khetha ukuba zeziphi iindima zebhodi ezivunyelweyo ukwenza isenzo ngasinye. Abasebenzisi be-Admin Panel (abalawuli behlabathi) bahlala benawo onke amalungelo kwaye abanakuthintelwa apha.
delete-linked-card-before-this-card: Awukwazi ukucima eli khadi phambi kokuba uqale ngokucima ikhadi elidityanisiweyo elinalo
delete-linked-cards-before-this-list: Awunako ukucima olu luhlu ngaphambi kokuba uqale ngokucima amakhadi aqhagamshelweyo akhomba amakhadi kolu luhlu
drag-template-here-to-share: Tsala iBhodi yeSakhelo apha ukuze wabelane ngayo
remove-domain-from-board: Uqinisekile ufuna ukususa esi sizinda kule bhodi?
invalid-domain: Isizinda esingasebenziyo. Sebenzisa isizinda esifana ne-example.com (akukho @ okanye izithuba).
shared-templates-info: Khangela iibhodi zesakhelo ezabelekayo zabasebenzisi, ezihlelwe ngoMbutho, iQela okanye iSizinda se-imeyile. Khetha isabelo esinye okanye ngaphezulu ngezantsi ukubonisa izakhelo ezabelwanwayo ezihambelanayo. Kuphela abasebenzisi ababhodi yabo yeeTemplates inezinto abadweliswayo.
shared-templates-select-scope: Khetha isabelo ngentla (iiMbutho, amaQela okanye iZizinda) ukubonisa izakhelo ezabelwanwayo.
dueCardsViewChange-choice-all-descriptio: Ibonisa onke amakhadi angaphelelanga anomhla *emiselweyo* kwiibhodi ezinemvume yomsebenzisi.
globalSearchViewChange-choice-all-descri: Khangela onke amakhadi kwiibhodi onemvume kuzo. Khetha *Amakhadi am* ukunciphisa iziphumo kumakhadi apho uyilungu okanye umbelwe khona.
dueCards-noResults-description: Awunawo nawaphi na amakhadi anemihla emiselweyo okwangoku.
operator-limit-invalid: %s ayingomda osebenzayo.  Umda kufuneka ube yinani elipheleleyo.
globalSearch-instructions-description: Uphendlo lungabandakanya abaqhubi ukucokisa uphendlo.  Abasebenzisi bachazwa ngokubhala igama lomsebenzisi kunye nexabiso elahlulwe yikholoni.  Umzekelo, iinkcukacha zomsebenzisi we- `list:Blocked` zinganciphisa uphendlo lwamakhadi aqulethwe kuluhlu olubizwa ngokuba *Ivaliwe*.  Ukuba ixabiso liqulathe izithuba okanye oonobumba abakhethekileyo kufuneka lifakwe kumanqaku okucaphula (umz. `__operator_list__:"To Review"`).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-due: `__operator_due__:<n>` - ​​amakhadi afuneka ukuya kuthi ga *<n>* iintsuku ukususela ngoku.  `__operator_due__:__predicate_overdue__ udwelisa onke amakhadi adlulileyo kumhla wawo.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-modif: `__operator_modified__:<n>` - ​​amakhadi aye alungiswa *<n>* kwiintsuku ezidlulileyo okanye ngaphantsi
globalSearch-instructions-operator-has: `__operator_has__:<field>` - ​​apho *<field>* yenye ye `__predicate_attachment__`, `__predicate_checklist__`, `__predicate_description__`, `__predicate_start__`, `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_end__`, `__predicate_assignee__` okanye `__predicate_member__`.  Ukubeka i-`-` phambi kwe *<field>* kukhangelwa ukungabikho kwexabiso kuloo ndawo (umz. `has:-due` ukhangela amakhadi ngaphandle komhla omiselweyo).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-sort: `__operator_sort__:<sort-name>` - ​​apho *<sort-name>* yenye ye `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_created__` okanye `__predicate_modified__`.  Kuhlobo oluhlayo, beka i-`-` phambi kohlobo lwegama.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-limit: `__operator_limit__:<n>` - ​​apho *<n>* iyinani elipheleleyo elibonisa inani lamakhadi aza kuboniswa kwiphepha ngalinye.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-2:
Abasebenzisi abafanayo bafakwe *OKANYE* kunye.  Amakhadi ahambelana nayo nayiphi na imiqathango aya kubuyiselwa.
`__operator_list__:Available __operator_list__:Blocked` angabuyisela amakhadi aqulethwe kulo naluphi na uluhlu olunegama elithi *Ovaliweyo* okanye *Iyafumaneka*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3: Abasebenzisi abohlukeneyo ba *AND*ed kunye.  Kuphela ngamakhadi afana nabo bonke abasebenzi abahlukeneyo abuyiselwayo.  `__operator_list__:Available __operator_label__:red` ubuyisela amakhadi kuphela kuluhlu *Iyafumaneka* enombhalo *obomvu*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3-2: Iintsuku zinokuchazwa njengenani elichanekileyo okanye elichasayo okanye kusetyenziswa `__predicate_week__`, `__predicate_month__`, `__predicate_quarter__` okanye `__predicate_year__` okwangoku.
import-dependencies-placeholder: Okanye ncamathelisa i-JSON / SVG yeexhomekekiso apha
import-dependencies-empty: Khetha ibhodi kwaye unikeze ubuncinane umgca omnye woxhomekekiso
board-background-delete-pop: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima lo mfanekiso ongasemva?
location-detect-from-map: Fumanisa indawo kunye naliphi na ikhonkco lemephu
server-error-troubleshooting:
Nceda ungenise imposiso eyenziwe ngumncedisi.
Kufakelo olukhawulezayo, sebenzisa: `sudo snap logs wekan.wekan`
Ufakelo lweDocker, sebenzisa: `sudo docker logs wekan-app`
hide-activities-of-all-boards: Musa ukubonisa imisebenzi yebhodi kuzo zonke iibhodi
now-activities-of-all-boards-are-hidden: Ngoku yonke imisebenzi yazo zonke iibhodi ifihliwe
creator: Mdali
delete-org-warning-message: Awunakucima lo mbutho, kukho nokuba mnye umsebenzisi ongowawo
delete-team-warning-message: Ayikwazi ukucima eli qela, kukho ubuncinane umsebenzisi omnye ongowalo
subject: Umxholo
remove-team-from-table: Uqinisekile ufuna ukususa eli qela ebhodini ?
Node_heap_total_heap_size_executable: Imfumba yeNode: ubungakanani bemfumba iyonke ephunyezwayo
Node_memory_usage_rss: Ukusetyenziswa kwememori yeNode: ubungakanani beseti yomhlali
Node_memory_usage_heap_total: Ukusetyenziswa kwememori yeNode: ubungakanani bubonke bemfumba eyabelweyo
Node_memory_usage_heap_used: Ukusetyenziswa kwememori yeNode: inkumbulo yokwenyani esetyenzisiweyo
remove-organization-from-board: Uqinisekile ufuna ukususa lo mbutho kule bhodi ?
newlineBecomesNewChecklistItem: Umgca ngamnye wombhalo uba yenye yezinto zoluhlu lokutshekisha
newLineNewItem: Umgca omnye wombhalo = into yoluhlu lokukhangela olunye
newlineBecomesNewChecklistItemOriginOrde: Umgca ngamnye wombhalo uba yenye yezinto zoluhlu lokutshekisha, iodolo yoqobo
move-all-attachments-of-board-to-fs: Hambisa zonke izincamatheliso zebhodi kwindlela yefayile
move-attachments-none-found: Akukho nto igcinwe kwisitoreji somthombo esikhethiweyo, ngoko akukho nto yokuhambisa.
attachment-repair-locations-description: Fumana iziqhoboshelo nee-avatars apho isitoreji esibhaliweyo (filesystem / GridFS / cloud) singasahambelani nalapho ifayile ikhoyo, kwaye ulungise i-database ukuze ikhombe kwindawo yokwenene.
default-save-storage-description: Khetha isitoreji apho iziqhoboshelo ezisandula ukulayishwa zigcinwa khona.
mongodb-compact-description: Emva kokuhambisa iifayile ukuphuma kwi-MongoDB GridFS, ifayile ye-database ekwidiski ayinciphi ngokuzenzekelayo. Ukuqhuba i-Compact kubuyisela isithuba esikhululekileyo ngokuphinda kubhalwe idatha yeqokelelo. Yiqhube oku kuphela emva kokuba ukuhanjiswa kweefayile ezininzi kugqityiwe.
mongodb-compact-warning: Isilumkiso: I-Compact ngumsebenzi othintelayo onokuthatha imizuzu embalwa kwii-database ezinkulu. Kwii-replica sets, zonke ii-secondaries zicutywa kuqala (ngokuzenzekelayo), emva koko i-primary. Kwii-replica sets ze-node enye ezisetyenziselwa i-oplog (useto oluqhelekileyo lwe-Meteor), yi-primary kuphela ecutywayo.
mongodb-compact-running: Kuqhutywa i-compact, oku kunokuthatha imizuzu embalwa...
invalid-file: Ukuba igama lefayile alisebenzi, ukulayisha okanye ukuthiya ngokutsha kuyarhoxiswa.
preview-pdf-not-supported: Isixhobo sakho asikuxhasi ukujonga kwangaphambili iPDF. Zama ukukhuphela endaweni yoko.
drag-board-to-workspace: Tsala ibhodi ukuya ku- __workspaces__ (yilahla indawo yokusebenza kwibar esecaleni)
delete-translation-confirm-popup: Ngaba uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima lo mtya wenguqulelo yesiko? Akukho kuguqulwa.
import-board-zip: Yongeza ifayile ye-zip enebhodi ye-JSON iifayile, kunye nebhodi yamagama angaphantsi kwabalawuli abanezihlomelo
accounts-lockout-info: Ezi setingi zilawula ukuba iinzame zokungena zikhuselwa njani kuhlaselo olungenalusini.
accounts-lockout-known-users: Iisetingi zabasebenzisi abaziwayo (igama lomsebenzisi elichanekileyo, igama lokugqitha elingalunganga)
accounts-lockout-locked-users-info: Abasebenzisi batshixelwe ngaphandle ngenxa yeenzame ezininzi ezingaphumelelanga zokungena
accounts-lockout-confirm-unlock-all: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuvula bonke abasebenzisi abatshixiweyo?
attachments-path-description: Indlela apho iifayile ezincamathelayo zigcinwa khona
avatars-path-description: Indlela apho iifayile ze-avatar zigcinwa khona
cron-job-delete-confirm: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima lo msebenzi ucwangcisiweyo?
s3-minio-storage-description: Isitoreji sezinto esihambelana ne-S3: AWS S3, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Wasabi, DigitalOcean Spaces nezinye.
s3-force-path-style-description: Ifunwa yi-MinIO kunye neeseva ezininzi ezingezizo ze-AWS ezihambelana ne-S3.
azure-connection-string-description: Ngokukhethayo: sebenzisa umtya woqhagamshelo opheleleyo endaweni yegama le-akhawunti kunye nesitshixo.
database-migration-description: Fudusela idatha esekelwe kumbhalo (yonke into ngaphandle kweziqhoboshelo nee-avatars, ezihlala kwi-filesystem) phakathi kwe-MongoDB kunye ne-FerretDB v1 (SQLite). Enye i-database kufuneka isebenze kwaye ifikeleleke (ii-ports ezimiselweyo: FerretDB mongodb://127.0.0.1:27018, MongoDB mongodb://127.0.0.1:27019; bhangisa nge-WEKAN_FERRETDB_URL / WEKAN_MONGODB_URL). Emva kokuba igqibile, khomba i-MONGO_URL kwenye i-database uze uqale kwakhona i-WeKan (kwi-Snap: snap set wekan database=ferretdb okanye =mongodb).
database-migration-confirm: Khuphela zonke iiqokelelo ezisekelwe kumbhalo ku-__db__? Iziqhoboshelo nee-avatars kwi-filesystem azichaphazeleki. I-database ekujoliswe kuyo kufuneka isebenza.
sandstorm-migration-description: Xa i-WeKan isebenza ngaphakathi kwe-Sandstorm grain, i-database yayo endala ye-MongoDB 3 ifuduselwa ku-FerretDB v1 (SQLite) ekuqaleni kokuqala, kwaye iziqhoboshelo nee-avatars zihanjiswa ukusuka kwi-database ukuya kwii-directories ze-files/attachments kunye ne-files/avatars ze-grain. Oku kubonisa ukuba ukufuduka kuphumelele na kwaye ingakanani isithuba sediski iifayile ezikrwada ze-database ye-MongoDB endala ezisasisebenzisayo ngaphakathi kwe-grain, kwaye kukuvumela ukuba ucime ezo fayile zikrwada ukukhulula isithuba.
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb-description: Emva kokufuduka okuphumeleleyo idatha ihlala kwi-FerretDB nakwi-filesystem, ngoko iifayile ezikrwada ezindala ze-database ye-MongoDB 3 zinokucinywa ukukhulula isithuba sediski ye-grain. Oku akunakuguqulwa.
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb-confirm: Cima iifayile ezikrwada ze-database ye-MongoDB 3 ukukhulula isithuba sediski? Idatha sele ifuduselwe ku-FerretDB nakwi-filesystem. Oku akunakuguqulwa.
sandstorm-raw-mongodb-deleted: Iifayile ze-database ekrwada ye-MongoDB zicinyiwe, kukhululwe
cards-loading-description: Indlela ibhodi nganye elayisha ngayo amakhadi ayo. Onke amakhadi: ikhadi ngalinye lilayishwa kwibrawza (elula, zonke iimpawu ziyasebenza, kodwa ibhodi enamawaka amakhadi ithumela idatha eninzi kumbukeli ngamnye). I-Lazy: uluhlu ngalunye lulayisha kuphela amakhadi abonakalayo ngoku (i-scroll engenasiphelo) kunye nenani eliphilayo, ngoko iibhodi ezinkulu kakhulu zisebenzisa imemori ne-bandwidth encinci. Kwakhona imiselwa yi-CARDS_LOADING environment variable.
cards-loading-lazy-note: Ukulayisha ikhadi nge-Lazy kusekuvavanyweni: iikhawunta zamakhadi kunye nemida ye-WIP zichanekile, kodwa imiboniso ye-Calendar/Table/Gantt kunye nokukhetha okuninzi kubonisa kuphela amakhadi alayishiweyo kuza kuthi ga ngoku. Layisha kwakhona iibhodi ezivuliweyo emva kokutshintsha oku.
render-links-as-plain-text-description: Xa kuvuliwe, onke amakhonkco (womabini amakhonkco e-markdown afana ne-[label](url) kunye nee-tags ezikrwada ze-HTML <a href>) ahlala eboniswa njengombhalo ocacileyo, ongacofekiyo kuyo yonke intsimi yombhalo otyebileyo (izihloko zebhodi nekhadi, iinkcazo, izimvo, uluhlu lokukhangela, njl.). Oku kuthintela amakhonkco acofekayo alahlekisayo. Okumiselweyo kucimile, ngoko amakhonkco ahlala ecofeka.
always-show-code-as-text: Soloko ubonisa yonke ikhowudi njengombhalo ocacileyo
always-show-code-as-text-description: Xa kuvuliwe, umbhalo otyebileyo awuze uboniswe njenge-markdown okanye i-HTML: umthombo wonke uhlala uboniswa njengombhalo ocacileyo kuyo yonke intsimi yombhalo otyebileyo (izihloko zebhodi nekhadi, iinkcazo, izimvo, uluhlu lokukhangela, njl.). Oku kubonisa umxholo ofihliweyo — izimvo ze-HTML (<!-- -->), ekujoliswe kuko kwamakhonkco e-markdown, i-JavaScript nayo nayiphi na enye ikhowudi — ngoko yonke ikhowudi ihlala ibonakala, ingacofeki, kwaye ingasebenzi. Okumiselweyo kucimile, ngoko i-markdown iboniswa ngesiqhelo.
disable-all-import-description: Xa kuvuliwe, zonke iimpawu zokungenisa zicinywa: ukungenisa ibhodi evela kwi-WeKan JSON, Trello, CSV/Excel, Jira, Kanboard, NextCloud Deck, OpenProject, GitHub, GitLab, Gitea kunye ne-Forgejo, kunye nokwenza ikhophi yebhodi. Ukhetho lwemenyu yokungenisa lufihliwe kwaye iseva iyasala nasiphi na isicelo sokungenisa. Okumiselweyo kucimile.
disable-all-export-description: Xa kuvuliwe, zonke iimpawu zokuthumela ngaphandle zicinywa: ukuthumela ibhodi njenge-WeKan JSON, CSV, Excel, Kanboard, okanye ku-NextCloud Deck / OpenProject / GitHub / GitLab / Gitea / Forgejo, kunye nokuthumela isiqhoboshelo esinye. Ukhetho lwemenyu yokuthumela ngaphandle lufihliwe kwaye iseva iyasala nasiphi na isicelo sokuthumela ngaphandle. Okumiselweyo kucimile.
disable-import-avatars-description: Xa kuvuliwe, ii-avatars (imifanekiso yeprofayile yomsebenzisi) azize zingeniswe. Oku kubandakanya ukungenisa kwe-WeKan JSON, ukungenisa kwe-Trello, kunye nokuvumelanisa kwe-avatar ukusuka kubaboneleli bezazisi bangaphandle xa ungena (LDAP, OIDC/OAuth2). Amagama nenye idatha isengeniswa; kuphela ii-avatars ezitsityelwayo. Okumiselweyo kucimile.
disable-export-avatars-description: Xa kuvuliwe, ii-avatars (imifanekiso yeprofayile yomsebenzisi) azize zibandakanywe xa kukhutshwa ibhodi (ukukhutshwa kwe-WeKan JSON kunye ne-CSV). Amagama omsebenzisi nenye idatha isakhutshwa; kuphela ii-avatars ezishiywayo. Okumiselweyo kucimile.
anonymize-import-users-description: Xa kuvuliwe, ukungenisa ibhodi ye-WeKan JSON kutshintsha igama lomsebenzisi ngamnye ongenisiweyo, igama elipheleleyo neeleta zokuqala ngeziphathi-ndawo zekhawunta (user1, user2, ...), kususe i-avatar yabo, kwaye kubhale kwakhona ukukhankanywa kwe-@username (kunye neentsimi ze-requested-by / assigned-by) ngaphakathi komxholo wekhadi nezimvo ezingenisiweyo. Akukho sazisi somsebenzisi sokwenene esivela kwibhodi yomthombo esigcinwayo. Igama elithi "user" lilandela ulwimi lomntu ongenisayo. Okumiselweyo kucimile.
anonymize-export-users-description: Xa kuvuliwe, ukukhupha ibhodi kutshintsha igama lomsebenzisi ngamnye okhutshiweyo, igama elipheleleyo neeleta zokuqala ngeziphathi-ndawo zekhawunta (user1, user2, ...), kususe i-avatar yabo, kwaye kubhale kwakhona ukukhankanywa kwe-@username (kunye neentsimi ze-requested-by / assigned-by) ngaphakathi komxholo wekhadi nezimvo. Ifayile ekhutshiweyo ayinaso isazisi somsebenzisi sokwenene. Igama elithi "user" lilandela ulwimi lomntu okhuphayo. Okumiselweyo kucimile.
disable-activities-description: Xa kuvuliwe, amangeno e-activity-feed azize arekhodwe kwaye azize aboniswe naphi na (ibar esecaleni yebhodi kunye ne-tab yomsebenzi wekhadi). Akukho mbali igcinwayo yokuba ngubani owenze ntoni. Okumiselweyo kucimile.
disable-notifications-description: Xa kuvuliwe, i-WeKan ayize ithumele izaziso zokubukela (ngaphakathi kwe-app, i-imeyile okanye ezinye iinkonzo) nawuphi na umsebenzi. Imisebenzi isenokurekhodwa (ngaphandle kokuba nayo icinyiwe ngentla); kuphela izaziso ezicinywayo. Okumiselweyo kucimile.
disable-watch-description: Xa kuvuliwe, uphawu lokubukela luyacinywa — abasebenzisi abakwazi ukubhalisa kwiibhodi, izintlu okanye amakhadi ukufumana izaziso, kwaye nawuphi na umzamo wokutshintsha inqanaba lokubukela uyaliwa. Okumiselweyo kucimile.
backup-description: Gcina iZiqhoboshelo, ii-Avatars kunye/okanye iDatha (zonke iiqokelelo ezisekelwe kumbhalo ezingezizo iziqhoboshelo okanye ii-avatars). I-.zip ithunyelwa ngokuthe ngqo kwisitoreji esikhethiweyo — akukho fayile yethutyana — njenge-backup/YYYY/MM/DD/HH_MM_SS/backup.zip, equlethe i-YYYY_MM_DD-HH_MM_SS/attachments, /avatars kunye ne-/data. Izitoreji ze-cloud (S3/MinIO, Azure, GCS) zisebenzisa iziqinisekiso ezicwangcisiweyo kwii-tabs zazo zesitoreji.
backup-restore-confirm: Buyisela ugcino olukhethiweyo? Iziqhoboshelo/ii-avatars zibhalwa kwi-filesystem kwaye idatha kwi-database ngokwemowudi ekhethiweyo.
gcs-key-filename-description: Ngokukhethayo: indlela eya kwifayile yesitshixo ye-JSON ye-akhawunti yenkonzo kwiseva.
gcs-credentials-description: Ngokukhethayo: ncamathelisa isitshixo se-JSON se-akhawunti yenkonzo. Yishiye ingenanto ukuze usebenzise ifayile yesitshixo okanye iziqinisekiso ezimiselweyo.
gcs-permissions-note: Nika i-akhawunti yenkonzo ye-WeKan ufikelelo lokufunda/lokubhala kwi-bucket: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → i-bucket yakho → Permissions → Grant access. Ku-"New principals", ncamathelisa i-imeyile ye-akhawunti yenkonzo — ixabiso le-"client_email" elivela kwisitshixo sakho se-JSON — emva koko khetha indima "Storage Object Admin" uze uGcine.
cloud-secret-keep-blank: Yishiye ingenanto ukuze ugcine ixabiso langoku.
gcs-bucket-description: Igama le-bucket ye-Cloud Storage yokugcina iifayile.
s3-endpoint-menu-path: AWS: yishiye ingenanto (isebenzisa i-endpoint yommandla). Ehambelana ne-S3: i-Endpoint URL evela kwi-console yakho ye-MinIO / Cloudflare R2 / Backblaze B2 / Wasabi / DigitalOcean Spaces.
s3-region-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → i-bucket yakho → Properties → AWS Region.
s3-bucket-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → igama le-bucket yakho (okanye Create bucket → Bucket name).
s3-access-key-menu-path: AWS Console → IAM → Users → umsebenzisi wakho → Security credentials → Access keys → Create access key → khetha imeko yokusetyenziswa 'Application running outside AWS' → Create access key. Iboniswa njenge 'Access key ID'.
s3-secret-key-menu-path: Isikrini esifanayo ne-Access key ID; i-'Secret access key' iboniswa kanye kuphela xa isitshixo senziwa — yikhuphele ngoko (okanye Download .csv).
azure-account-name-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → i-akhawunti yakho → igama eliboniswe phezulu (kwakhona phantsi kwe-Security + networking → Access keys → Storage account name).
azure-account-key-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → i-akhawunti yakho → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Show → Key.
azure-connection-string-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → i-akhawunti yakho → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Connection string → Show.
azure-container-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → i-akhawunti yakho → Data storage → Containers → isikhongozeli sakho (okanye + Container ukwenza esinye).
gcs-project-id-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → isikhetho seprojekthi phezulu → i-ID yeprojekthi yakho (Cloud overview → Dashboard → Project info → Project ID).
gcs-bucket-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → igama le-bucket yakho (okanye Create ukwenza esinye).
gcs-key-filename-menu-path: Indlela kwiseva ye-WeKan eya kwifayile yesitshixo ye-JSON ye-akhawunti yenkonzo ekhutshelweyo (eyenziwe ngezantsi). Sebenzisa oku OKANYE ncamathelisa i-JSON kwintsimi engezantsi.
gcs-credentials-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service accounts → i-akhawunti yakho yenkonzo → Keys → Add key → Create new key → JSON → Create (ikhuphela ifayile). Ncamathelisa okuqulethwe kuyo apha, okanye gcina ifayile uze umisele indlela yayo ngentla.
migration-stop-confirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukumisa konke ukufuduka?
gridfs-move-collectionfs-note: Ukuze iziqhoboshelo nee-avatars zibonakale, zihambise ukusuka kwi-CollectionFS uya kuso nasiphi na esinye isitoreji.
s3-enabled-description: Sebenzisa i-AWS S3 okanye iMiniO yokugcina ifayile
s3-endpoint-description: S3 endpoint URL (umzekelo, s3.amazonaws.com okanye minio.example.com)
comprehensive-board-migration-descriptio: Yenza iitshekhi ezibanzi kunye nokulungiswa kwengqibelelo yedatha yebhodi, kubandakanywa ukucwangcisa uluhlu, izikhundla zekhadi, kunye nesakhiwo se-swimlane.
delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migration-d: Icima ngokukhuselekileyo uluhlu oluphindiweyo olungenanto. Isusa kuphela uluhlu olungenamakhadi KWAYE unolunye uluhlu olunesihloko esifanayo esinamakhadi.
restore-lost-cards-migration-description: Fumana kwaye ubuyisela amakhadi kunye nezintlu kunye swimlaneId ezingekhoyo okanye listId. Yenza 'Amakhadi alahlekileyo' indlela yokuqubha ukwenza zonke izinto ezilahlekileyo zibonakale kwakhona.
restore-all-archived-migration-descripti: Ibuyisela zonke iindawo zokuqubha ezigciniweyo, izintlu, kunye namakhadi. Ulungisa ngokuzenzekelayo nayiphi na i-swimlaneId engekhoyo okanye i-listId ukwenza izinto zibonakale.
fix-missing-lists-migration-description: Ukukhangela kunye nokulungiswa kwezintlu ezingekhoyo okanye ezonakalisiweyo kwisakhiwo sebhodi.
fix-avatar-urls-migration-description: Hlaziya ii-URL ze-avatar zamalungu ebhodi ukuze asebenzise i-backend yogcino echanekileyo kunye nokulungiswa kweembekiselo ezaphukileyo ze-avatar.
fix-all-file-urls-migration-description: Uhlaziywa zonke ii-URL ezincamatheleyo zefayile kule bhodi ukuze kusetyenziswe ugcino oluchanekileyo lokungasemva kwaye ulungise iimbekiselo zeefayile ezaphukileyo.
migrations-description: Qhuba uhlolo lwengqibelelo yedatha kunye nolungiso lwale bhodi. Ukufuduka ngakunye kunokwenziwa ngabanye.
run-comprehensive-migration-confirm: Oku kuya kwenza ufuduko olubanzi ukujonga nokulungisa imfezeko yedatha yebhodi. Oku kungathatha imizuzwana. Qhubeka?
run-delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migrati: Oku kuya kuqala ukuguqula naziphi na izintlu ekwabelwana ngayo kuluhlu lokuqubha ngalinye, emva koko ucime uluhlu olungenanto olunoluhlu oluphindiweyo olunesihloko esifanayo esinamakhadi. Kuphela luluhlu olungenanto ngokwenene oluya kususwa. Qhubeka?
run-restore-lost-cards-migration-confirm: Oku kuya kudala i-swimlane 'Amakhadi alahlekileyo' kwaye abuyisele onke amakhadi kunye noluhlu olulahlekileyo lwe-swimlaneId okanye uluhluId. Oku kuchaphazela kuphela izinto ezingagcinwanga. Qhubeka?
run-restore-all-archived-migration-confi: Oku kuya kubuyisela ZONKE ii-swimlanes ezigciniweyo, izintlu, kunye namakhadi, ukuze zibonakale kwakhona. Naziphi na izinto ezine-ID ezingekhoyo ziya kulungiswa ngokuzenzekelayo. Oku akunakuhlehliswa lula. Qhubeka?
run-fix-missing-lists-migration-confirm: Oku kuya kukhangela kwaye kulungise izintlu ezingekhoyo okanye ezonakeleyo kwisakhiwo sebhodi. Qhubeka?
run-fix-avatar-urls-migration-confirm: Oku kuya kuhlaziya ii-URL ze-avatar zamalungu ebhodi ukuba asebenzise i-backend yokugcina echanekileyo. Qhubeka?
run-fix-all-file-urls-migration-confirm: Oku kuya kuhlaziya zonke ii-URL ezincamatheleyo zefayile kule bhodi ukuze zisebenzise ugcino oluchanekileyo lokungasemva. Qhubeka?
restore-lost-cards-nothing-to-restore: Akukho zixhobo zokuqubha ezilahlekileyo, zintlu, okanye amakhadi anokubuyiselwa
migration-progress-note: Nceda ulinde ngelixa sifudusela ibhodi yakho kwisakhiwo samva nje...
conversion-info-text: Olu guqulelo lwenziwa kanye kwibhodi nganye kwaye luphucula ukusebenza. Ungaqhubeka usebenzisa ibhodi ngokuqhelekileyo.
converting-board-description: Ukuguqulwa kwesakhiwo sebhodi ukwenzela ukuphuculwa komsebenzi. Oku kungathatha imizuzwana.
migration-batch-size-description: Inani lezinto ezincamatheleyo ekufuneka ziqhubeke kwibhetshi nganye (1-100)
migration-cpu-threshold-description: Misa ukufuduka xa ukusetyenziswa kwe-CPU kugqitha le pesenti (10-90)
migration-info-text: Ukufuduka kwedatha kwenziwa kanye kwaye kuphuculwe ukusebenza kwenkqubo. Inkqubo iyaqhubeka ngasemva nokuba uvala isikhangeli sakho.
migration-warning-text: Nceda ungasivali isikhangeli sakho ngexesha lokufuduka. Inkqubo iya kuqhubeka ngasemva kodwa inokuthatha ixesha elide ukuyigqiba.
sign-in-to-upload: Sayina ungene ukuze ufake iindawo zokugcina
account-locked: Iakhawunti itshixiwe okwethutyana ngenxa yemizamo emininzi yokungena engaphumelelanga. Nceda uzame kwakhona mva.
username-password-required: Igama lomsebenzisi kunye negama lokugqitha ziyafuneka
username-too-short: Igama lomsebenzisi kufuneka libe nonobumba aba-3 ubuncinane
problems-summary-help: Khangela iindawo zeengxaki ozihlolileyo, uze ucofe uVuma ukuze usete kwakhona ubalo lweengxaki ezintsha.
